text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Arima Kinen, and everyone is
talking about how this is the last race for the
exceptionally talented Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan boldly proclaims that she won't let
Oguri Cap be the star of this race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap, Mejiro McQueen, and Mejiro Ryan are
here...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And all three of them are putting their dreams on
the line as the Arima Kinen begins!
